report: M1 Advanced — FORMAL U1–U21 browser acceptance gate

records.purpose: Provenance attestation unchecked blocks compute
records.expected: compute disabled; helper "Confirm ORA same-result attestation"; no result card
records.observed: disabled=true; helper="Confirm ORA same-result attestation"; resultCard=false

records.purpose: Valid ORA high quality renders ORA card with quality "high", no error styling
records.input: ORA gat=18 cct=540 iopcc=18.2 ch=10 wfs=7.5 count=4, confirmed
records.expected: ORA result card; quality level "high"; no failure-card

records.purpose: Any success shows the not-eligible-for-target-IOP line
records.expected: text "Not eligible for target-IOP comparison" visible

records.purpose: CH=20 shows out-of-observed-range note (not an error), CH carries no coefficient
records.expected: note "outside the 4-18 mmHg observed range"; success (no failure); CH non-modifying

records.purpose: Unrecognized Corvis label -> quality "unknown" + provisional-mapping tooltip; raw label retained in form
records.expected: quality chip "unknown"; tooltip contains "mapping provisional (corvis-map-0.1)"; raw label shown
records.observed: qualityUnknown=true; tooltip="Raw label: ZZZ\nCorvis quality mapping provisional (corvis-map-0.1)"; rawInputRetained=true

records.purpose: Both with identical device values shows no-difference strip
records.expected: strip "No marked cross-device difference detected."

records.purpose: Both diff>3 without temporal confirmation -> unconfirmed strip, neutral tint
records.expected: strip "Numerical difference shown; clinical comparison not established."; neutral (non-warning) tint

records.purpose: Prior LASIK -> Core estimate not applicable; device applicability "limited"; refractive flag string
records.expected: Core "not applicable"; applicability "limited"; section 6.1 refractive flag

records.purpose: Integration measurement_failure payload routes to failure; failure card shows no large number and no copy button
records.input: engine payload measurement_failure.occurred=true (integration only) + UI-reachable failure for card semantics
records.expected: engine status failure (type measurement_failure); failure card; no large mmHg number; no copy button

records.purpose: Integration eye-mismatch payload routes to EYE_MISMATCH failure with remediation message
records.expected: engine failure code EYE_MISMATCH with section 6.2 remediation string

records.purpose: Recompute into a failure clears the previous success card first (U11 clearing)
records.input: ORA success, then gat_iop=999 invalid, recompute
records.expected: no .result-card remains; exactly one .failure-card

records.purpose: Switching ORA->Corvis emits a Corvis payload with no ora_inputs / ora_metadata keys
records.input: fill ORA, switch device_branch to corvis, fill Corvis, compute (real payload captured at M1ADV.computeM1Advanced)
records.expected: payload sent to engine: device_branch=corvis, no ora_inputs key, no ora_metadata key

records.purpose: Advanced never writes the Core key: ofty_m1_result stays byte-identical (or absent); only ofty_m1_advanced_result is written
records.input: seed ofty_m1_result sentinel then Advanced compute (Case A); empty storage then Advanced compute (Case B)
records.expected: Case A: ofty_m1_result unchanged + ofty_m1_advanced_result written; Case B: ofty_m1_result absent + only ofty_m1_advanced_result among ofty_m1* keys

records.purpose: Corrupt Advanced JSON yields adapter {ok:false, reason:"corrupt_json"} and the UI recovers (no crash)
records.input: seed ofty_m1_advanced_result with invalid JSON, read via adapter, then recompute
records.expected: adapter returns {ok:false, reason:"corrupt_json"}; subsequent compute writes valid JSON

records.purpose: When Core applicability is not_applicable, no Core IOP number appears (rendered or exported)
records.expected: no "not true IOP: <number>" anywhere in card or copied text

records.purpose: Both result has no DOM element marked as primary/hero (no single device is elevated)
records.expected: zero elements with primary/hero class/data/role markers

records.purpose: Copy (ORA canonical) matches spec section 7.1 byte-for-byte
records.input: ORA gat=18 cct=540 iopcc=18.2 ch=10 confirmed -> Copy
records.expected: copied text === spec section 7.1 fenced block (byte-for-byte, from spec file)

records.purpose: Copy (invalid temporal, single-branch ORA) suffixes the delta line per section 7.4 rule 2, byte-for-byte
records.expected: copied === spec 7.1 with IOPcc line replaced by the spec 7.1 suffixed line

records.purpose: Copy (Core not_applicable) replaces the Core line per section 7.4 rule 1, byte-for-byte
records.expected: copied contains exact line "CCT-contextualized Core estimate — not true IOP: not applicable (<reason>)" and no Core number
records.observed: EXACT LINE MATCH: "CCT-contextualized Core estimate — not true IOP: not applicable (Post-refractive surgery (LASIK): GAT-CCT linear model invalidated; device interpretation requires review.)"

records.purpose: Copy (Both) matches spec section 7.3 byte-for-byte with engine interpretation substituted
records.input: Both gat=16 cct=540 ora=18 corvis=22 confirmed -> Copy
records.expected: copied === spec 7.3 block with <device_comparison.interpretation> replaced by engine string

records.purpose: Accessibility: DOM tab order branch->shared->modifier->device->temporal->compute; failure moves focus into failure card; result region aria-live=polite
records.input: Tab from #device_branch with temporal accordion open; then trigger failure
records.expected: focus order is a subsequence of the canonical order and reaches compute; focus inside failure card on failure; aria-live="polite"

records.purpose: At 320px width there is no horizontal overflow and Both order is ORA->Corvis->cross-device
records.expected: documentElement.scrollWidth <= innerWidth; text order ORA < Corvis < cross-device

records.purpose: Every rendered/exported number matches section 7.0 helpers; no clinical number appears that the engine did not return; near-zero delta forced to "+0.0"
records.input: Corvis export (pressures, CCT integer, SP-A1 mmHg/mm, SSI bare, delta) + engine-number cross-check
records.expected: pressures "x.x mmHg"; CCT "n µm"; SP-A1 "x.x mmHg/mm"; SSI bare; delta signed; all clinical tokens engine-returned; fmtDelta(0)/(-0.04)="+0.0"

records.purpose: Encounter ID alone does NOT validate the comparison; only clinician_confirmation=true does
records.input: Both with encounter_id="ENC-123", clinician_confirmation=false then true
records.expected: unconfirmed: basis="unconfirmed", comparison_valid=false; confirmed: basis="clinician_confirmed_same_session", comparison_valid=true

records.purpose: Tampered manifest ALG_VERSION blocks compute (load-time integrity gate)
records.expected: banner shown + compute disabled + detail matches /ALG_VERSION/

records.purpose: Tampered manifest bundle SHA-256 blocks compute
records.input: served manifest with wrong bundle hash
records.expected: banner shown + compute disabled + detail matches /bundle SHA-256/
records.observed: bannerVisible=true; computeDisabled=true; detail="bundle SHA-256 9f9a0fe47c82… ≠ manifest deadbeefdead…"

records.purpose: Tampered schema $id + hash blocks compute (vs manifest AND vs M1ADV.CONSTANTS)
records.expected: banner shown + compute disabled + detail matches /(schema SHA-256|schema \$id)/
records.observed: bannerVisible=true; computeDisabled=true; detail="schema SHA-256 e7c90ab1028e… ≠ manifest fbd983b1a443… · schema $id M1-ADV-SCHEMA-BOGUS ≠ manifest.schema_version M1-ADV-SCHEMA-1.3 · schema $id M1-ADV-SCHEMA-BOGUS ≠ M1ADV.CONSTANTS.SCHEMA_VERSION M1-ADV-SCHEMA-1.3"

records.purpose: No uncaught console/page errors during canonical acceptance flow
records.expected: zero console errors / page errors
